import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let n = match string.parse_int(trimmed)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let t = a + b
    a = b
    b = t
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("fib=#{a}")
end
